Aerospace Case

Lightweight Aerospace Bracket and Complex Cavity Machining

lightweight bracket / complex cavity / structural weight reduction

IndustriesAerospace
Part Functionlightweight bracket / complex cavity / structural weight reduction
Manufacturing Capabilitiesmulti-axis CNC machining, pocketing, tight-tolerance features, deburring and CMM inspection

Project Scenario

The aerospace case involved lightweight structural parts with complex pockets, multi-face references and tight assembly interfaces.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The finished parts helped verify structural weight reduction while keeping critical mounting features under control.
